description_long: This is a compact, modern chaise with a dark fabric upholstery and a minimalist design. The seat features two distinct, thick cushions that provide ample comfort, while the backrest is gently curved and extends the full width of the seat. Both armrests are present, smoothly integrated into the overall silhouette, and curve outward slightly for ergonomic support. The legs are short, straight, and made of wood, providing a subtle contrast to the dark upholstery. The surface of the chaise appears matte and soft, with no visible patterns or tufting, giving it a sleek and contemporary look. This piece would fit well in urban parks, public waiting areas, or residential outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, dark-upholstered chaise with two seat cushions, curved backrest, and wooden legs, featuring a sleek and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the chaise, two seat cushions, and both armrests curving outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the gentle outward curve of the armrest and the thickness of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid, unadorned backrest and the wooden legs, with no visible cushions or armrests.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest's curve and the depth of the seat cushions.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium-height, gently curved, and extends the full width of the chaise. It is smooth, unsegmented, and lacks any decorative elements or tufting.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both armrests are present, smoothly integrated into the sides, and curve outward slightly for comfort.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and made of wood with a simple, unadorned finish, providing a sturdy base and a subtle contrast to the dark upholstery.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid dark gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two large, rectangular seat cushions placed side by side, both appearing to be attached or closely fitted to the seat base, with no additional loose or layered cushions visible.
